case_title: LOIS LEE COOPER VS. MITCH AFANA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-12-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-05-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - NO FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAR-07-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AFANA, MITCH AKA MITCH AFNAN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COOPER, LOIS LEE AS TO DEFENDANT AFANA, MITCH AKA MITCH AFNAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
